baseline.notes: Run 35 recovered F1 from 0.372 → 0.389 via band widening + soccer-tuned YOLO (+3 TP, -4 FP on gated types). Ball detection rate lifted 52% → 68%. But GK events (catch P=0.23 / shot_stop_diving P=0.13) were NOT gated, so 43 combined FPs still untouched. Run 35 diag also found only 14/107 gated events had GK detections — insufficient for Run #37 parry design until GK events are themselves gated.

targets.notes: GK-proximity gate should cut shot_stop_diving FPs from 26 → ≤13 and catch FPs from 17 → ≤12. Expected F1 lift +0.03 to +0.05 (breakthrough target 0.42). Threshold 0.20 is provisional — Run #36 diag enables calibration for #36b.

notes: Run #36 — GK-proximity gate. _GATED_TYPES extended to include CATCH, SHOT_STOP_DIVING, SHOT_STOP_STANDING, PUNCH. New _verify_gk_action requires ball and GK co-visible in ≥1 sampled frame with normalized Euclidean distance ≤ 0.20 (YOLO_GK_PROXIMITY_THRESHOLD). Fail-open when ball OR GK missing (preserves recall). Multiple GKs handled by nearest-pick. This run also collects the ball+GK diagnostics on GK events needed for Run #37 parry-signature design.
